zones.name: North Boulevard
zones.description: Mostly sunny with isolated areas of shade near trees. Soil is compacted and varies in moisture from very dry at the edges to damp in low areas.

zones.name: Berry Border
zones.description: Mostly sunny. Soil is lighter, drier, and looser relative to the other zones.

zones.name: Maple
zones.description: Mostly shaded by a Norway Maple, with part sun on the east and south sides. Ground is heavily mulched with wood chips and leaves. Soil varies between dry and moist due to root presence, sun exposure, and berms and swales.

zones.name: Hydrangea Border
zones.description: Sun in the morning and evening with shade through most of the day. Steep slope with stone retaining wall. Soil is loose, loamy, and dry.

zones.name: Front Yard
zones.description: Mostly shady through the day with increased late afternoon sun. Soil is compacted clay loam, wet in spring and dry in the summer.

zones.name: Back Yard
zones.description: Mostly sunny. Contains four raised beds with hex wire enclosures used for growing annual edibles. Soil is a raised bed mixture with annual additions of compost and leaves.

zones.name: Side Yard
zones.description: Sun exposure varies from heavy shade to mostly sunny. Yard is narrow and steeply sloped from the house down to the sidewalk. Soil is generally compacted and varies in moisture from damp at the shady top of the slope to dry at the sunny bottom.
